release_notes: Fixed HTTP 500 on landing-only streams (a stream with a landing and no offer). The click log required an offer (offer_id NOT NULL + foreign key), so a no-offer click failed with a database error before the landing could load. The clicks.offer_id column is now nullable (automatic DB migration), no-offer clicks are logged with NULL, and click logging can no longer break the page. Landing statistics keep working; only offer attribution is empty, as expected.
